title: BILPreferenceEventMap
description: Repo-safe mapping from BIL observations to contracts/schemas/preference-event.schema.json. This is config/spec only; live event streams remain runtime/NAS-side.
offline_truth: Local JSONL correction/preference logs remain replayable source truth if BIL is offline.

manual_correction.notes: Explicit human correction signal; strongest training input.

file_reused.notes: A file being reused/opened again suggests continuing relevance.

copied_text.notes: Copied text is a strong passive interest signal.

long_dwell_scroll.notes: Long dwell or deep scroll indicates moderate interest.

opened_tab.notes: Opening a tab is weak evidence until reinforced by dwell/save/copy.

accidental_visit.notes: Short or accidental visits should not train preference upward.
